intent.responsibility: Own one reusable incoming-call notification boundary for phone application interfaces.
intent.visualBoundary: Own one bounded Surface with exact Avatar, Label and Icon Row child boundaries in compact or stacked-actions layout.
intent.runtimeBehavior: Resolve presence plus the exact Avatar, Label and Icon Row Runtime contracts without manufacturing child values.
intent.forwarding: Forward each declared child Runtime contract unchanged to its exact fixed Component Variant boundary.
intent.temporalOwnership: Own reusable boundary Motion; the embedding parent owns the appearance event and owner-relative time.

component.name: Incoming Call Notification
component.notes: Reusable iOS and Android incoming-call notification with exact child Runtime forwarding.

metadata.note: Scaffolded incoming-call notification owner with iOS and Android Variants.
